name: Scallops with Lime Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust scallops lightly with flour and shake off any excess.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet.
3. Add scallops and brown lightly; the center should be slightly translucent. Remove scallops from pan and keep warm.
4. Pour off excess oil from skillet, then add wine. Reduce wine until syrupy.
5. Stir in cream and reduce until cream has thickened slightly.
6. Turn heat to low and whisk in butter and lime juice. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. Pour sauce over scallops and garnish with lime slices.
